sections.heading: Why Test?
sections.content: ViewModel and Repository contain core app logic in Android MVVM. Testing ensures UI state, events, and data handling work correctly without a device or network. ViewModel tests cover state transitions, navigation, and error handling. Repository tests cover data source selection, caching, mapping, and error propagation.

sections.heading: Key Practices
items: Apply MainDispatcherRule to replace Dispatchers.Main in ViewModel tests
Use Turbine to test StateFlow/SharedFlow sequences and one-shot events
Mock dependencies or use Fakes for repositories
Test caching scenarios: hit, miss, stale, network error
Test Room DAO with in-memory database
Use SavedStateHandle in tests for arguments and state restoration
Use test data builders to reduce boilerplate

sections.heading: Common Mistakes
items: Testing with real repositories or Room DB
Skipping error and empty state tests
